headline: Qorvo, Allegro MicroSystems, and Lattice Semiconductor Stocks Trade Up, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after the broader market rallied on Iran peace progress and AI-linked growth names led the comeback in technology. Nvidia's Q1 results earlier in the week (beat-and-raise on $81.6B revenue with Q2 guidance of $89-92.8B and an $80B new buyback) initially produced a sell-the-news reaction, but the message digested over the next two sessions: AI capex is accelerating, not slowing.
